response.justification: Bogdan Szabo’s resume demonstrates extensive experience in full-stack development, primarily using JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other high-level languages, but lacks direct evidence of required embedded C programming, Linux kernel modification, or networking/security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or switch chip knowledge. While his background in systems programming (e.g., D language, C/C++) is present, it is not aligned with the embedded networking security focus. Additionally, there is no indication of Japanese language proficiency or experience with chip-vendor SDKs or embedded hardware control.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with diverse programming languages (C, C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript)
Experience with system-level programming, including low-latency applications and real-time metadata handling
Evidence of technical leadership, mentorship, and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded C programming for networking/security features
Lacks required Linux kernel modification experience or embedded hardware control
No indication of Japanese language proficiency or familiarity with networking protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) or switch chip technologies

key_factors.factor: Linux kernel modification and embedded hardware control
